# chickenstats

> Python package for scraping and analyzing NHL statistics; supports Polars, Pandas, PyArrow, and narwhals backends.

chickenstats has two submodules:

- `chickenstats.chicken_nhl` — Scrape play-by-play, rosters, shifts, and score-adjusted stats from NHL API and HTML endpoints
- `chickenstats.evolving_hockey` — Augment and aggregate CSV exports from Evolving-Hockey.com

Install: `pip install chickenstats`

## Quick start — chicken_nhl

```python
from chickenstats import Season, Scraper
import polars as pl

season = Season(2025)
schedule = season.schedule("NSH")
game_ids = schedule.filter(pl.col("game_state") == "OFF")["game_id"].to_list()

scraper = Scraper(game_ids)
play_by_play = scraper.play_by_play      # Full play-by-play DataFrame
stats = scraper.stats                     # Individual + on-ice stats
team_stats = scraper.team_stats          # Team-level stats
forward_lines = scraper.prep_lines(position="f").lines
```

## Quick start — evolving_hockey

```python
import polars as pl
from chickenstats.evolving_hockey import prep_pbp, prep_stats, prep_lines

raw_shifts = pl.read_csv("raw_shifts.csv")
raw_pbp = pl.read_csv("raw_pbp.csv")

play_by_play = prep_pbp(raw_pbp, raw_shifts)
stats = prep_stats(play_by_play, level="game", teammates=True)
lines = prep_lines(play_by_play, level="season", position="f")
```

## Docs

- [chicken_nhl user guide](https://chickenstats.com/guide/chicken_nhl/chicken_nhl/): Scraper, Season, aggregation options (level, teammates, score-adjusted)
- [evolving_hockey user guide](https://chickenstats.com/guide/evolving_hockey/evolving_hockey/): prep_pbp, prep_stats, prep_lines with Evolving-Hockey exports
- [API reference](https://chickenstats.com/reference/chicken_nhl/scrape/): Full reference for Scraper, Season, Game, Player, Team, and standalone aggregation functions

## Optional

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/chickenandstats/chickenstats): Source code, examples, changelog
